name: Indomable Coffee
description: A cozy neighborhood gem filled with aromatic brews, comforting bites, and a welcoming atmosphere that feels like a hug in café form.

name: Hidden Grounds
description: A charming café blending South Asian flavors with specialty coffee, creating the perfect spot for quiet mornings and cozy catch-ups.

name: Bibble & Sip
description: A beloved café serving adorable pastries and specialty drinks in a cozy atmosphere. The lavender latte is one of my favorites, offering the perfect balance of floral sweetness and comfort.

name: Mottley Kitchen
description: A welcoming café known for its fresh pastries, specialty coffee, and relaxed atmosphere. Whether you're catching up with friends or enjoying a quiet moment, it's the perfect place to unwind with something delicious.

name: Mokafe
description: A beloved café serving Yemeni-inspired coffee, decadent desserts, and cozy vibes. From fragrant lattes to honeycomb bread, every treat feels like a little adventure for the senses.

name: Café de Olla
description: A cozy café inspired by traditional Mexican flavors and comforting homemade dishes. The warm atmosphere and rich, cinnamon-spiced coffee make it the perfect place to slow down and enjoy a little taste of home.
